defense.critical_failure: As success, but the target grows four blisters.
defense.failure: As success, but the target grows two blisters.
defense.success: The target grows one blister. You can spend a single action, which has the concentrate trait, to pop a blister. The target and each creature in a 15-foot cone originating from the target takes 7d6 acid damage (basic Fortitude save). You choose the direction of the cone, which can't include the target. When no blisters are left, the spell ends.

heightened.text: The damage of a popped blister increases by 1d6.

spell.name: Blister
spell.text: You point at a target in range, and its skin grows searing blisters filled with caustic fluid. The target must attempt a Fortitude save.

traits.name: Concentrate
traits.text: An action with this trait requires a degree of mental concentration and discipline.

traits.name: Manipulate
traits.text: You must physically manipulate an item or make gestures to use an action with this trait. Creatures without a suitable appendage can’t perform actions with this trait. Manipulate actions often trigger reactions.
